theme_strategy: Hybrid Light Mode First - Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) combined with Luxury E1 twist. Southeast Asia aesthetic emphasizing warmth, nature, and premium hospitality.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-[4rem] font-medium tracking-tight leading-[1.1]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-tight

rules: No generic sans-serif for headings (Banned: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans).
Use Playfair Display for all major section titles.
Never center align dense paragraphs or form inputs; keep them left-aligned.
Background is Warm Sand, Primary is Terracotta, Foreground is Deep Forest/Charcoal.
Do NOT use pure transparent backgrounds if content scrolls underneath. Use glassmorphism.
Never use pure black or pure white. Tint all neutrals.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/60 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] backdrop-saturate-150
visual_enhancers.buttons: rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95
visual_enhancers.surface_rules: Marketplace uses glassmorphism and bento grids; Host/Admin dashboards use high-density rigid grids with 1px borders.

grids_and_layouts.spacing_system: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16). Use 2-3x more spacing than default.

hero_section.rules: Hero dominant visual takes col-span-8 row-span-2. Use bg-black/30 overlay maximum on images.

ai_planner.layout: Grid with col-span-4 for Chat interface (Glassmorphism), col-span-8 for Map/Itinerary visualization.

dashboards.layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Flat solid surfaces, no glassmorphism here. Sharp 1px borders.

motion.hover_states: All interactive elements need micro-animations. hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-white for primary buttons.
motion.page_transitions: Framer Motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.stagger_children: Lists and grid items must use Framer Motion stagger children variants.

usage: Use case 1: Hero Section - Render a subtle floating 3D landscape or floating abstract geometry (TorusKnot/Icosahedron) styled like frosted glass (MeshPhysicalMaterial with transmission=1, roughness=0.2) to make it look premium and attractive without distracting from bookings.
Use case 2: AI Planner Map - Instead of a flat 2D map, incorporate a rotating 3D globe or a 3D isometric plane for the itinerary visualization if possible, or use floating 3D pins over the map.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio. Terracotta primary text on Sand background needs to be dark enough.
accessibility.data_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button').

hero_backgrounds.description: Lake next to lush green forest homestay

properties.description: Rustic wooden hut nestled in hillside
Serene bamboo hut in dense forest

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Playfair Display and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.html.
Update tailwind.config.js with the provided HSL color variables and extend font families.
Install lucide-react and @phosphor-icons/react. Use Phosphor Icons for the dashboard and Lucide for the marketplace.
Install framer-motion and implement entrance animations on all major sections.
Install @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei. Implement a visually stunning 3D element in the hero section or AI planner.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dialog, Select, Dropdown, Tabs), but customize them to match the E1 luxury styling (not default Vercel style).
Build out 3 distinct dashboards/flows: Traveller, Host, Admin based on the problem statement requirements.
Ensure 'AI Planner' has a split view: a chat UI (left) and an interactive Itinerary/Map UI (right) that displays the recommended HiddenStay properties.
In Host Dashboard, cleanly break down the 5% platform fee vs 95% host earnings.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do NOT use dark colors as gradients. Use layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui. Examine them before creating new ones.
NEVER use placeholder URLs for images. Use the provided image_urls.
